# Blazor Migration Orchestrator Prompt (Archived)

Status: Completed and archived.

This prompt was used during the React-to-Blazor migration execution and is now preserved for historical context.

Current repository state:
- The Blazor frontend in src is the active in-repo application.
- Migration phase execution is complete.

Use these files for historical evidence and decisions:
- docs/blazor-migration/README.md
- docs/blazor-migration/current-state-baseline.md
- docs/blazor-migration/target-blazor-architecture.md
- docs/blazor-migration/phase-gates.md
- docs/blazor-migration/migration-backlog.md
- docs/blazor-migration/cutover-and-rollback.md

Do not treat this file as an active instruction set for new implementation work.
